name: R5: Geometric mean of R0 and R1
origin: Postulated (geometric midpoint of two derived rules)

name: R4: Path-normalized product
origin: Derived (cycle normalization by support size, CE6)

name: R7: Degree-weighted shell product
formula: prod(phi^{2n/d(n)}), d = vertex degree in path graph

name: R8: Spanning-tree weight
formula: prod of edge weights in spanning tree of shell graph
origin: Derived (Kirchhoff's theorem on shell graph, CE5+CE7)
